narrative:
South Bloomfield-North (precinct in Pickaway County) has 457 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 29.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 17.7 percentage points.
